message:
feat(action): integrate supervisor detection in robot mode

Add `require_human_for_supervised` policy gate (default: true) that blocks
automatic actions on processes supervised by AI agents or IDEs when running
in robot mode.

Changes:
- Add CheckAgentSupervision pre-check enum variant in plan/mod.rs
- Implement check_agent_supervision in LivePreCheckProvider to detect
  human-supervised processes via supervision module
- Add is_supervised field to RobotCandidate and RequireHumanForSupervised
  constraint kind in robot_constraints.rs
- Add require_human_for_supervised field to RobotMode config (pt-config)

This ensures that processes running under Claude Code, Codex, VS Code, or
similar AI agents require explicit human confirmation before kill/restart.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
